case_title: IRISH SPRINT AND STRIDE VS SAN FRANCISCO FRENCH BREAD CO BOUDIN BAKERY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY IRISH SPRINT AND STRIDE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FRENCH BREAD CO BOUDIN BAKERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO PETER H. SHER (SF FRENCH BREAD) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRISH SPRINT AND STRIDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FRENCH BREAD CO BOUDIN BAKERY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FRENCH BREAD CO BOUDIN BAKERY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22579, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRISH SPRINT AND STRIDE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FRENCH BREAD CO BOUDIN BAKERY PLNTF SHALL PAY DEFT. $38.00 CT COST. JUDG ENTERED ON 8/12/93 SUP CT SCA 22579 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
